title: Top 10 AI Trading Agents Achieve Up to 139% Annualized Gains
author: tickeron_community
selftext: **New York, NY – November 9, 2025** – [**Tickeron**](https://tickeron.com/), a pioneer in AI-powered investment technology, has announced its [**Top 10 AI Trading Agents**](https://tickeron.com/app/ai-robots/virtualagents/top-10/), highlighting exceptional performance across a variety of market conditions. Built on **Financial Learning Models (FLMs)**, these agents have achieved **annualized returns between 38% and 139%**, based on live and backtested data across multiple tickers. As volatility increases, these AI-driven systems help traders act with precision and confidence, combining **machine learning** with **advanced technical analysis** for superior results.
